options.text: I'm okay, I guess. I like coffee and cats.
Sure! I'm a marketing professional with 3 years of experience in digital campaigns.
I don't know what to say. I'm just nervous.
I graduated last year, but I haven't done anything important yet.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了具体的职业背景和经验，符合面试回应的专业性要求。选项1和3过于随意或消极，不符合面试语境；选项4自我贬低，会削弱面试官的信心。
content.speakerText: Hi, thanks for coming in today. Could you start by telling me a bit about yourself?
content.speakerTextCn: 你好，感谢你今天来，能先简单介绍一下自己吗？

options.text: I used to work at a restaurant, but now I'm just looking for something better.
Of course! I've spent the last five years as a project manager in tech, leading teams of 8–12 people.
Can we skip this part? I'm not good at talking about myself.

content.explanation: 正确答案提供了具体职位、时长和职责，体现专业性和细节。选项1消极且无关；选项3空泛夸张；选项4拒绝回答，不符合面试礼仪。
content.speakerText: Welcome! To begin, could you share a little about your professional background?
content.speakerTextCn: 欢迎！首先，你能简单谈谈你的职业背景吗？
